name: Secure Azure Hub-and-Spoke Network
handle: securing hub-and-spoke azure networks with azure firewall and point-to-site vpn
description: This project demonstrates how to secure Azure hub-and-spoke networks using Azure Firewall and Point-to-Site VPN.
body_html:
Secure Azure Architecture

This project demonstrates best practices for deploying secure workloads on Azure.

Key Features

  • Hub-and-spoke networking
  • Azure Firewall
  • Azure Point-to-Site VPN
  • Virtual Network Peering

Read more

name: Azure FinOps Power BI Dashboard
description: This project demonstrates how to build, analyse and visualise Azure cloud costs in a Power BI dashboard.
body_html:
Azure FinOps Power BI Dashboard

This project demonstrates the use of Power BI.

Key Features

  • Top Service by Spend
  • Cost per Service
  • Cost optimization with FinOps

Read more

name: Cloud Resume Challenge
description: This project demonstrates how to design and deploy a full-stack cloud resume application using Azure services and serverless architecture.
body_html:
Cloud Resume Challenge (Azure)

This project demonstrates the implementation of a serverless, cloud-native resume website using Microsoft Azure, following the Cloud Resume Challenge framework.

Key Features

  • Static website hosting with Azure Static Web Apps
  • Azure Front Door
  • Cloudflare
  • Serverless backend using Azure Functions
  • Azure Container Storage
  • View counter stored in Cosmos DB
  • Infrastructure-as-Code for repeatable deployments
  • Frontend built with React + Vite
  • Infrastructure-as-Code for repeatable deployments
  • Local development and testing workflow

This project demonstrates practical cloud engineering skills including API design, cloud security, automation, and cost-aware architecture.

Read more

name: Azure IIS Hosting with Application Gateway
handle: hosting multiple iis websites on azure VM using application gateway and https
description: This project demonstrates how to host multiple IIS websites on an Azure VM using Application Gateway and HTTPS.
body_html:
Azure IIS Hosting with Application Gateway

This project demonstrates hosting multiple IIS websites on an Azure VM using Application Gateway and HTTPS.

Key Features

  • Multiple IIS websites
  • Application Gateway
  • HTTPS Configuration
  • Cost optimization with FinOps

Read more
